name: 99.co
description: Operator of an online property listing marketplace intended for sale and rent. The company's platform offers a map-based property search engine that uses algorithms, enabling customers to find houses, condominiums, and apartments for sale and rental purposes.

name: abillion
description: Developer of a global review and discovery platform designed to voice an opinion about anything plant-based or cruelty-free. The company's platform leverages technology to help find where to eat, plant-based recipes, perspectives and tips on living well, and also share feedback with business owners to help them shift to more plant-based options, enabling customers to voice their opinions on plant-based alternatives.

name: Aerodyne
description: Developer of a DT3 (drone technology, data technology & digital transformation) enterprise solutions provider designed for large-scale data operations, analytics, and process optimization. The company's DT3 solutions resolve complex pain points of major industries worldwide by offering valuable capabilities for applications such as transmission tower inspection, wind turbines (WTG), solar farms, and other critical infrastructures, enabling organizations to rapidly scale, digitally transform, operate optimally, and increase productivity.

name: Ahlijasa
description: Provider of an on-demand platform designed to offer laundry services. The company's platform simplifies the process of finding the right service professional for all personal and household needs, enabling consumers to hire household assistance through a mobile application.

name: AI Palette
description: Stay ahead of consumer trends with real-time predictive analytics

name: AiSensum
description: Developer of Robotic Process Automation (RBS) tools intended to help in the collection of accurate data. The company's tools include monetizing retail, telco, pharma, and finance data assets from startups through a revenue share arrangement as well as artificial intelligence modules which are designed to sit within legacy systems and help improve system performance over time, enabling businesses to access a lower-cost alternative to automated AI platforms.

name: Aliena
description: Manufacturer of low-power propulsion systems designed to enhance the performance of satellites in advanced maneuvers in space. The company's systems include miniaturized propulsion systems and end-to-end remote sensing devices for data acquisition and analytics, enabling small satellite designers to get an ideal propulsion system for small satellite missions.

name: AllCare
description: Developer of a digital membership platform designed to offer benefits to freelancers and self-employed individuals. The company's platform offers benefits such as health, training, and transportation, enabling freelancers and self-employed individuals to get access to affordable company benefits and other perks which are enjoyed by traditional employees.

name: AllSome
description: Developer of e-commerce fulfillment software intended to provide parcel tracking systems to track packages delivered from online e-commerce sites. The company's software offers a cross-border fulfillment option to track, and get notified for easy order management without heavy investments, enabling companies to take care of their online businesses.

name: Alodokter
description: Operator of a healthcare information and appointment booking platform intended to offer quality content and interaction with qualified Indonesian doctors. The company's platform provides credible information, supportive communities, doctor appointment booking, and in-depth reference material about health subjects as well as offers various information about the illness, treatment, and healthy living guide, enabling users to make informed health decisions during emergencies.

name: Amalan
description: Operator of debt management programs intended to leverage affordable loan restructuring systems in cooperation with lenders. The company focuses on debt negotiations, providing financial literacy, and designing debt repayment plans, enabling clients to pay out debts in a timely manner and avoid penalties and high-interest rates.

name: AOne
description: B2B Backend Management SaaS and payment software for educational businesses in Southeast Asia

name: Cakeshop
description: Operator of a skincare marketplace intended to empower the skincare journey. The company's marketplace provides recommendations, trail sampling, and connects for advice from skin influencers, aestheticians, and dermatologists, enabling customers to have a constant guide for their skincare regime.

name: Appboxo
description: Developer of an open SaaS platform designed to help creators launch an app within apps. The company's platform allows users to launch mini-apps within an app without downloading which is loaded instantly to integrate various services, enabling developers to avail tools to make performant and customized mini-apps to increase the utility of their apps and enhance user experience.

name: App-CM
description: Developer of an in-line video ads platform designed to provide open-source video compression. The company's advertising platform uses unique video-player technology, without requiring large data traffic, to enable compression of up to one-tenth to one-twentieth in data volume compared to typical formats which are conventionally used for mobile video ad networks, enabling advertisers to publish their ad videos with peace of mind.

name: Apple
description: Operator of an e-commerce platform intended to offer a wide range of baby-care products and essentials. The company's platform offers a wide range of infant goods that include but are not limited to diapers, wipes, skin care, oral care and cleaning products made from quality materials and ingredients, enabling customers to have access to affordable premium baby-care goods.

name: App Onboard
description: Developer of a no-code development software designed to bring ideas to life without having to write a single code. The company's software creates applications, playable advertisements, application prototypes, and game developments without the need of writing codes, enabling users to design, build and share their interactive experiences on application stores and social networks.

name: APX
description: Operator of a cloud freight consolidator platform intended to optimize business operations. The company's platform specializes in offering services including admin control, order management, shipment processing, dispatch management, and route optimization, enabling businesses to automate manual tasks and improve supply chain efficiency and profitability.

name: Arcstone
description: Developer of an enterprise platform designed to accelerate the digitization of the global manufacturing supply chain. The company's platform focuses on operationalizing streams of data to bring about visibility, control, and improvements, enabling enterprise buyers to review and optimize processes across their entire supply chain in real-time, from their top suppliers.

name: Asaak
description: Developer of a mobile-based microfinance platform designed to democratize financial services and help businesses grow with confidence. The company's platform manages lending operations, underwriting, application processing, investor management, and loan servicing, enabling clients to access various digital finance tools to reach customers.

name: Atomionics
description: Developer of atomic sensing devices designed to accelerate control loop feedback, navigation, and resource exploration. The company's sensors harness the quantum mechanical properties of atoms and provide the measurement of fundamental parameters with utmost precision, enabling clients and research centers to measure parameters like gravity, acceleration, and rotation with better accuracy.

name: AtomX
description: Operator of an online advertising platform intended to allow advertisers, publishers, and intermediaries to control each impression. The company's platform offers an online marketplace that connects networks, demand-side platforms, supply-side platforms, and other parties and features pre- and post-bid fraud detection algorithms, advanced reports, and a control panel, enabling businesses to eliminate all fraud pre-bid and exercise full control over their advertisements.

name: Avant
description: Operator of a homegrown brand intended to offer halal personal care products. The company specializes in skincare and cosmetics enabling it to offer all-natural, non-inflammatory, non-toxic, and effective ingredients to address various skin concerns, enabling consumers to get quality skincare products.

name: AWST
description: Developer of a non-fungible token infrastructure platform designed to make Web3 and NFTs accessible to everyone. The company's platform provides a quality user experience for anyone to familiarize themselves with the key aspects of interacting with Web3 and owning NFTs, enabling newcomers and power users to interact with interoperable platforms such as OpenSea.

name: Ayannah
description: Developer of a fintech platform designed to provide affordable and accessible digital commerce and payment services. The company's platform provides digital financial services to the world's emerging middle class, most of whom are migrants or unbanked, enabling customers to avail of affordable finance and improve their quality of life.

name: Baania
description: Operator of a real estate information platform intended to offer a database of real estate listings to customers. The company's platform uses information about projects, houses and various house designs to find and compare properties in Thailand with the option of seeing their historical prices, enabling buyers to calculate interest on properties and make informed decisions about them before buying.

name: Bayapay Sdn Bhd
description: Provider of a smart fuel fleet payment & fleet management platform intended to help commercial vehicle owners deter fraud, save cost, and digitize fleet management. The company offers a fully functional open-loop payment card to save money and stay ahead of the competition, enabling businesses to make secure payments within set limits and controls across all fleet-related expenses with ease.

name: BeautyDate
description: Operator of an online marketplace designed to offer beauty and salon services to people. The company's marketplace offers a location-based platform and mobile application that helps users to look up and schedule appointments with beauty-service providers in their cities as well as helps service providers to find their customers, enabling users to find the salon of their choice and their desired service provider within their city.

name: Belanjaparts
description: Developer of B2B e-commerce platform designed to digitize automotive workshops. The company platform offers various vehicle parts, other equipment, and lubricants at wholesale rates and quantities from various digital vendors, enabling small-medium workshops to market their products and supplies more effectively and efficiently.

name: Qapital OS
description: Developer of an online payment gateway platform designed to initiate automated and cashless bill payment services. The company's platform offers a secure payment portal where users can share confidential bank details to send bills and collect payments in real-time, enabling users to transact money securely.

name: BoxGreen
description: Provider of an online snack delivery service intended to deliver nutritious snacks to the doorstep. The company's service includes healthy snacks with wholesome ingredients that are natural and free from artificial flavoring and coloring every month, enabling consumers to consume them without affecting their health and stay fit.

name: Braintree
description: Provider of drone services intended to bring precision and automation to agriculture. The company provides drone services and AI-powered computer vision algorithms and technologies in mapping, evaluation, design & planning, database development, and analysis for agricultural entities, enabling the agricultural industry to process satellite remote sensing data for searching new suitable land for plantation.

name: Brandripe
description: Operator of a creative service agency intended to provide graphic design services. The company's agency provides advertising materials, web design, social media graphics and illustrations with unlimited design requests and revisions and vetted professional designers, enabling businesses to receive designs at a flat monthly fee.

name: Bukalapak
description: PT Bukalapak.com Tbk is a trusted online shopping site in Indonesia that sells a variety of products that are needed by Indonesian people. It offers electronic, cosmetic, apparel and various other products.

name: Call Levels
description: Developer of a mobile-based application designed to be used for financial assets tracking. The company's application offers a proprietary, reliable asset monitoring system that alarms about price changes through its automatic notification feature and price monitoring technology, enabling financial institutions and investors to track and set an alert for the financial market stocks, commodities, and indices.

name: Cargobase
description: Developer of a SaaS-based logistics platform designed to automate all procurement and freight management processes between enterprise shippers and logistics providers. The company's platform helps enterprise shippers to reduce logistics spending and save time with quoting, booking, management, and analysis of on-demand air, ocean, parcel, rail, and road shipments from their private pool of logistics providers, enabling clients to manage on-demand freight effectively.

name: Carousell
description: Operator of an online platform intended to simplify the process of buying and selling. The company's marketplace offers person-to-person buying and selling of products such as fashion items, home and living, mobile, and electronics among others simply by snapping a photo and posting a description of unused and secondhand clutter easily with free listings, enabling users to enjoy discounts and discover savings as well as save time and money.

name: Carsome
description: Operator of an online car-selling platform intended to connect customers to used car dealers. The company offers a range of services that include car inspection, ownership transfer to financing as well as offers a curated selection of cars to individuals who wish to buy pre-owned cars, enabling customers to sell cars within a day with no fee and no hassle.

name: Catch that bus
description: Developer of a mobile ticket booking application designed to help book bus tickets online. The company's application connects passengers to express bus operators where users can browse through and purchase tickets from a range of trusted operators to various destinations in Malaysia and Singapore, enabling users to book bus tickets directly with bus operators at their own convenience.

name: Chickin
description: Developer of agro-technology application designed to solve challenges faced by local farmers. The company's platform allows farmers to input data, including daily, sales and production data, to enhance performance and make it more measurable and at the same time, minimize risks through preventive measures, enabling farmers in the management of the poultry farm, data, IoT configuration adaptable to climate, temperature and humidity as well as recording the age of each poultry.

name: Clockster
description: Developer of staff management platform designed to offer a time and attendance management system for employees. The company's platform offers a cloud-based system in the form of a biometric-based clock-in device to focus on shift management, attendance, salary calculations, communications, and tasks, enabling food and beverage and retail industry enterprises to manage attendance and automate payroll, scheduling, business routines and save time.

name: Cloud Commerce
description: Developer of a cross-border e-commerce platform designed to connect product data with the online markets globally. The company's platform provides features such as posting products, updating stock, managing orders and connecting transportation systems automatically, enabling online sellers to manage their online marketplace worldwide.

name: Conicle
description: Developer of a learning management platform intended to help learning and development in organizations. The company's platform provides cloud-based learning management systems and ready-to-learn courses by partnering with industry experts to co-create, produce and provide online learning programs with coursework, evaluation and certificates for individuals and businesses, enabling clients to teach, learn and develop without boundaries.

name: Credilinq.ai
description: Developer of a technology infrastructure company designed to offer white-labeled embedded finance to its customers. The company's B2B (business-to-business) platforms and marketplaces seamlessly assimilate data digitally into the client's self-help application to help and understand their customers' businesses better and create unique credit scores for each of their borrowers, thereby enabling SMEs (Small and Medium Enterprises) to have hassle-free and fair access to capital and business growth.

name: Creopop
description: Developer of a three-dimensional (3D) printing pen designed to bring drawings to life without the risk of heating or melting. The company's pen is battery-operated and charged through a mini universal serial bus (USB), it uses light-sensitive ink called photopolymers that is immediately solidified by light-emitting diodes (LED) surrounding the nozzle of the pen when a button is pressed, enabling children and artists to draw their vision in three-dimension (3D).

name: Dagangan
description: Developer of an online distribution platform designed to help businesses to connect with consumers in rural villages. The company's tech platform supports a hub-and-spoke distribution model, that serves rural consumers by providing access for rural consumers to purchase daily necessities products offered by a network of principals or producers at affordable prices, enabling businesses to cut costs and reach out to more customers with data-driven production and supply-chain distribution of their products.

name: DARWINBOX DIGITAL SOLUTIONS
description: Developer of software as a service-based human resource management platform designed to transform the interaction between the workforce and technology. The company's platform offers an easy-to-use interface, functional depth, faster implementation cycles and new-age features including e-onboarding, merit planning, continuous feedback, performance journals and insightful analytics, enabling mid to large-sized enterprises to manage core operations and drive employee engagement and performance.

name: Decube
description: Developer of data observability software intended to help businesses ensure the accuracy, completeness, and consistency of their data. The company's software provides automated policy management through a policy-driven approach, safeguarding sensitive information by applying rules to mask specific keywords, such as addresses, ensuring privacy and compliance, classifying assets according to your organization's specific requirements, enabling products and business teams to revolutionize the way businesses engage with their data.

name: DeepSparks
description: Developer of an AI technology platform designed to assist with marketing and alternative scoring applications. The company's platform is a fully digitalized process of lowering risk in credit scoring in the loan approval process by analyzing data, enabling financial institutions and microlenders to serve customers in the underbanked sector.

name: DEZPAX
description: Operator of a food packing company intended to provide comprehensive food packing alternatives. The company allows simple customization ordering and designing for clients' packaging and printing solutions, as well as logo printing food box straps, stickers, glass sleeves and screen printing, enabling clients to provide food packing that is made with biodegradable materials.

name: Rainmarket
description:
We are Southeast Asia’s first financial markets infrastructure operator.
We are here to structure the unstructured, and to bridge the data and information gap.

name: DishDash
description: Developer of a corporate food management platform intended to provide meal plans for employees. The company provides employee meal plans, and special event and pantry management services, allowing businesses to easily and cost-effectively manage all of their employee, client, and event food needs via one portal.

name: Disrupt
description: Operator of an innovation accelerator company intended to create leaders that change the future of Thailand and South-East Asia. The company bridges the gap between startups, SMEs, and corporates, creating a community of transformative business leaders that work together to drive positive changes to the communities and its training program offers tools, frameworks, and methodologies for innovation, enabling entrepreneurs to get educated and build their creative products and startups.

name: DocDoc
description: Developer of an artificial intelligence-based healthcare platform designed to empower patients with the information they need to make healthcare decisions. The company's platform focuses on doctor discovery, telemedicine, and cashless services and enhances the end-to-end healthcare journey, enabling patients to optimize healthcare outcomes and costs.

name: Drivemate
description: Developer of an online car rental platform designed to reduce the wastage of fuel and positively impact sustainable development. The company's platform is a peer-to-peer car-sharing marketplace that connects vehicle owners with renters who can choose cars based on features like car variety and easy pick-up, without any hidden charges, enabling car owners to generate income from unlimited car rentals and renters to find cars nearby from where they live to travel conveniently.

name: Eatsii
description: Provider of online catering services intended for daily and eventual meals from white-collar workers working in central business district areas to the modern housewives. The company's serving includes Indonesian, Asian, Western and Japanese dishes with high-quality chefs and prioritizing delicious and hygienic flavors, providing meals that are tasty, clean and affordable for everyone to purchase.

name: EduAdvisor
description: Operator of an online education platform intended to help students compare colleges and courses. The company provides comprehensive information and comparison tools, translates education jargon into relevant content, provides recommendations and counseling and helps to compare courses, enabling students to make informed decisions about their college selection and obtain the right college education.

name: Edukita
description: Operator of an educational platform intended to deliver an effective and affordable English teaching experience. The company's platform aims to deliver a program that is effective in building fluency in an affordable way and offers live classes delivered by native speakers in an internationally benchmarked curriculum, enabling students to learn English in a way that is both effective and enjoyable.

name: eFishery
description: Operator of an Internet of Things-based aquaculture company intended to serve fish and shrimp farmers to reduce social and economic inequalities. The company offers an automatic fish feeder for commercial aquaculture that uses motion sensors to measure fish appetite and feed amounts and also provides integrated services, starting from farming operations, and financing to distribution, enabling fish farmers to increase productivity and profits in fish and shrimp farming.

name: Ejen2u
description: Developer of a reseller ecosystem platform intended to help business owners manage resellers like stockists, agents, and dropships. The company's platform is integrated, digitalized, and data-driven and offers systematic product ordering, detailed reporting, commissions, reward systems, databases, and performance monitoring among others, enabling businesses to improve productivity and profitability.

name: Ekomoditi
description: Developer of a plantation management software designed to increase the palm oil plantation. The company's software helps to simplify the record of plantation management, improve efficiency, reduce cost, increase productivity and monitor some aspects of the problems that have the potential to cause losses, enabling farmers to access information about different phases of the plantation.

name: Elevarm
description: Developer of an agricultural trading platform designed to offer sustainable agriculture assistance. The company's product offers the digitization of farmlands and provides supply services that also focus on the upstream side of farming, enabling business customers and farmers to maximize production and revenue.

name: Ematic Solutions
description: Developer of an email marketing platform designed to assist brands with generating revenue using an email channel. The company's platform uses artificial intelligence with automated email segmentation, enabling brands and digital marketers to grow their customer database and revenue from every campaign.

name: EMTECH
description: Developer of cloud-based software designed to provide central banks with scalable and resilient digital infrastructure. The company offers digital regulatory sandboxes for multi-party collaborative workflows, digital cash, and digital currency integrators for cross-border integration among others, enabling central banks to modernize operations and improve efficiency.

name: EnerGaia
description: Producer of algae products intended to provide a clean, healthy, and sustainable food source. The company offers a wide range of Spirulina-based products ranging from fresh powder, energy balls, and pasta, enabling consumers to get fresh and sustainable algae products.

name: engageSPARK
description: Developer of a mobile engagement platform designed to leverage the power of automation and workflows via phone calls, messaging and chat. The company's mobile engagement platform helps to create phone surveys, pre-recorded messages, interactive telephone services, automatic replies in audio or text and more, enabling companies to reach their clients and audiences through phone and SMS campaigns.

name: ESPL
description: Operator of a global media network intended to organize sports tournaments and events. The company's network specializes in creating a platform for entrepreneurs, engineers, gamers, and industry specialists to compete in online and on-ground tournaments, enabling gamers to access and participate in various global e-sports competitions.

name: FavStay
description: Operator of a vacation home rental platform designed to help people to list, find, and book accommodations completely. The company's platform offers a curated list of a wide variety of accommodations, enabling users to find rent hotels and rooms from local hosts.

name: Kredivo
description: Developer of a financial platform designed to create disruptive and meaningful products in retail credit. The company's platform provides access to credit to a large number of people and gives e-commerce shoppers instant credit financing based on real-time analysis, enabling customers to enjoy simple, transparent, and honest pricing for all their credits.

name: Finku
description: Developer of finance management platform designed to eliminate financial illiteracy in Indonesia. The company's platform lets users achieve financial goals through the automatic financial logger, financial insight and personalized monthly budget, and recurring billing reminders, enabling people to manage all their finances in one place.

name: Finnomena
description: Developer of an investment and portfolio management application designed to help users invest and manage financial goals. The company's application recommends an automated portfolio of stocks based on the risk that investors choose, along with tracking down their investment situations and adjusting their investment plans to their needs, enabling financial investors to research, analyze data and receive real-time analysis of market and funds.

name: First Circle
description: Developer of an online financing platform designed to offer short-term loans to small and medium enterprises. The company's platform offers collateral-free short-term working capital and trade financing, enabling businesses to grow and improve the course of opportunity.

name: FlowAccount
description: Developer of a cloud-based accounting platform designed to track payments and invoices. The company's platform features the ability to create and send professional invoices, track payments and transactions, open bills, share documents, and more, enabling enterprises to effectively manage their businesses and accounting process.

name: Food Market Hub
description: Operator of a procurement and inventory management platform intended to help restaurants to control purchasing. The company's platform offers features like central kitchen management, integration with accounting and POS, notification via various mediums, and inventory management, enabling clients to easily integrate the entire value chain from the farm to the restaurant.

name: Freshket
description: Operator of a web-based platform intended for restaurant supply management. The company's marketplace offers tools to find vendors and buy or sell fresh ingredients effortlessly through its connective marketplace and order management system, enabling clients to increase their business transaction efficiency, and information transparency and improve profitability.

name: Funding Societies | Modalku
description: Developer of a peer-to-peer lending platform designed to specialize in short-term financing for small and medium enterprises. The company's platform provides fast and flexible financing options including microloans, term loans and invoice financing, enabling clients to capitalize on businesses that often struggle to secure loans from banks and traditional providers.

name: Get
description: Operator of a financial platform intended to assist teens in saving and using money wisely. The company's platform helps users manage money while learning financial literacy and independence at an earlier age, even shop with their personalized card and get spending notifications via mobile application, enabling users to easily send and receive money with family and friends instantly.

name: GetCraft
description: Provider of content network services designed to discover and connect to content creators and marketers across the globe. The company helps to find creators and sponsored channels for content marketing, influencer marketing, and bespoke native advertising needs, enabling companies and agencies to get high-quality content at an affordable price.

name: Getlinks
description: Operator of an online recruitment platform intended to connect tech talents with opportunities across Asia. The company's platform helps job seekers to build a digital resume that highlights strengths and achievements to impress potential employers, follow job openings and apply and chat with recruiters, enabling students to find a suitable job and connect with the professional world.

name: Giztix
description: Operator of a transportation booking platform intended to check transportation and freight prices instantly. The company's platform manages fleets for free, books truck and tracks the shipment status in real time and gathers transporters for shippers for various types of full truckload services, enabling clients to compare shipping prices and book transportation services safely by starting a conversation with the transporter directly.

name: Glife
description: Operator of a food technology company intended to empower and uplift smallholder farmers and businesses with technology. The company focuses on sourcing, storage, packing, and distribution, enabling clients to reduce the risk of mishandling, damage, and contamination.

name: Globish
description: Developer of an online learning platform designed to teach English. The company's platform offers online English courses, one-on-one coaching classes, e-learning programs, workshops, and language tests, enabling individuals and working professionals to speak, interact, and learn the English language at home.

name: Gnowbe
description: Developer of a mobile micro-learning educational software designed to offer employee development, training, and engagement tool. The company's system features group boards for shared learning and, scheduled session deployment, rapid curation accessing multimedia options, gamification, offline access, and push notifications, enabling creators to improve culture, and capabilities by designing engaging, informative, fun content.

name: GoGet
description: Developer of a demand workforce platform designed to offer reliable and skilled manpower. The company's platform transforms the traditional labor market, no longer do people have to choose only between a full-time job or an eight-hour working shift, enabling businesses to grow their operations with a dynamic on-demand workforce to increase productivity and save costs.

name: ARG
description: Operator of a social e-commerce site for action sports based in San Francisco, California. The company provides its community with a curated selection of established and upcoming outdoor lifestyle brands.

name: GoWabi
description: Operator of aB2C and B2B applications to find and book health, wellness, fitness, beauty services in South-East Asia, supporting multiple payment options (Creditcard, Alipay, BNPL). The company's portal permits users to find a salon near them and book their appointment accordingly as well as offers cashback on every booking made to redeem for a cash discount, enabling users to search for top service providers of beauty and wellness all over Thailand and book online with discounts.

name: Grab
description: Founded in 2012, Grab provides ride-sharing services, food and grocery delivery, and financial services (payments, consumer loans, and enterprise offerings) in eight Southeast-Asian countries through its mobile platform. The company partners with merchants and riders, connecting them with consumers while charging commission to both sides. Grab has a leading market share in and derives 89% of its revenue from its core businesses, ride-sharing and food delivery. Singapore and Malaysia contributed 58% of revenue as of end-2021. Grab's main competitors in Southeast Asia are Foodpanda and Gojek, the ride-sharing arm of GoTo. Its financial services business is still in its nascent stage and provides minimal revenue currently. The company now also generates advertising revenue.

name: Grain
description: Developer of an online food delivery platform designed to serve food delivery of different preferences through online orders. The company's platform offers everyday meals and catering services featuring chef-crafted meals made with fresh and wholesome ingredients, enabling users to order healthy and fresh meals and satisfy their food experiences.

name: Halogen Capital
description: Developer of a digital platform designed to help investors gain exposure safely to the new asset classes. The company specializes in digital assets and combines traditional capital market expertise with deep technology knowledge, enabling clients to access digital assets, and help with private key management, tax uncertainties, and inconsistent fund reporting.

name: Hangry
description: Opeartor of a multi-brand delivery-only restaurant platform designed for consumers looking for a variety of food options. The company's platform offers a selection of virtual restaurants featuring local and international cuisines, enabling customers to order a wide range of meals through a user-friendly app and have them delivered directly to their location.

name: Happy5
description: Developer of a performance management platform designed to provide real-time people data. The company's platform allows managers to monitor and give reviews to rate the performance and continuous feedback related to a task, enabling employees to get visibility of all tasks' progress and their alignment with the company's strategic priority.

name: iCart
description: Operator of an online grocery service designed for an easy grocery shopping experience. The company helps to shop all products from local grocery stores around the city to deliver a simplified life, enabling customers to purchase groceries without having to worry about their freshness.

name: Hello Gold
description: Developer of a shariah-compliant mobile application designed to change the way users buy, save, sell, and redeem physical gold. The company's platform allows users to purchase and store gold online or take physical possession of the gold which can be sold at the prevailing exchange rates, enabling users to take a step toward lifelong financial security.

name: HelprNow
description: Operator of an online marketplace platform intended to assist customers in purchasing gifts. The company offers gifts for all kinds of occasions as well as provides customized gifts, along with recommendations of places to visit or dine for various events, enabling users to put a personal touch on gifts and purchase them at a low cost.

name: HijUp
description: Operator of an online fashion and lifestyle e-commerce platform designed to serve Muslim women. The company's platform offers a wide range of products including square hijab, scarf caps, long dresses, blazers and skirts as well as accessories such as masks, brooches, socks and necklaces.

name: Homage
description: Developer of a caregiving platform designed to match seniors in need of on-demand caregiving services with licensed practitioners. The company's platform optimizes caregiving based on factors such as illness, professional experience, and geography, as well as creates more robust databases of patient-generated healthcare data, providing deeper and better insights for care operators, hospitals, and medical service providers, enabling parents and grandparents to have the comfort and control to remain in their own homes as they age.

name: HQ, Headquarters
description: Developer of a crypto sub-ledger and treasury reporting platform designed to simplify crypto asset management for Web3 natives. The company's platform offers real-time portfolio tracking, automatic transaction reconciliation and accounting support, enabling customers to manage their crypto assets across wallets and exchanges.

name: HungryHub
description: Developer of a fixed-price dining application designed to offer buffet deals and share set menus. The company's platform permits diners to know food bills upfront before entering restaurants as well as assists restaurants to drive revenue through sustainable promotions, enabling restaurants to improve their customer engagement in food service.

name: Hydroleap
description: Developer of wastewater treatment technology designed to replace expensive chemical treatments with a smart electrical treatment for wastewater. The company's technology focuses on the treatment of high-suspended solid, high oil, and heavy metal-contaminated wastewater, enabling clients to receive water recycling services using electrical and membrane treatment systems.

name: Ikigai
description: Provider of a range of professional technology consulting services intended for fast-growing industries. The company offers technology consulting for different sectors like aerospace, digital services, entertainment, finance, fintech, MedTech and travel, enabling clients to obtain the perfect balance between business operations and technical efficiency.

name: Imajin
description: Operator of a manufacturing marketplace intended to build a manufacturing ecosystem in Indonesia. The company specializes in making molds, dies, and parts for CNC machine rental by connecting designers, machine facilities, 3D Printing, and manufacturer expert, enabling founders to create their own products from one single piece to mass production.

name: iMotorbike
description: Operator of a motorcycle marketplace intended to transform motorcycle sales in Southeast Asia. The company's marketplace offers a wide selection of motorcycles from a variety of brands and models and also provides a search engine that makes it easy to find motorcycles by make, model and location, enabling motorbike owners and two-wheeler enthusiasts to have a comprehensive motorcycle database that provides information about the same and find the suitable motorcycle for their needs.

name: IncreBio
description: Developer of a food biotechnology company intended to reinvent the juice industry with a sugar-free and healthier juice. The company's mission is to build the next generation of food & beverage that is healthier for everyone and greater for this planet with the power of biology, uses non-genetically modified microbes to reduce the amount of sugar and calories contained in juices without water dilution, enabling juice producers to customize the amount of natural sugar in their beverages.

name: Inflow
description: Operator of a supply chain and manufacturing platform for fashion brands. The company's platform offers a diversified manufacturing network that simplifies the supply chain process from sourcing to manufacturing and shipping, enabling clients to easily source, track, and manage their production by offering trendy designs including sustainable fabric options.

name: Infonesia
description: Developer of a knowledge-sharing platform designed to offer new experiences. The company's platform allows users to become creative question askers, share information and entertainment with a shout-out and get quick responses to their queries, enabling knowledge seekers and sharers to give and receive knowledge and earn income in the process.

name: Instanture
description: Our suite of AI SAAS help brand & distributor to manage their order & pay operation across multiple sales channels

name: Involve Asia

name: InvestaX

name: CoTeach

name: Jago Coffee

name: Jala

name: Kilo
description: Provider of software and application development services based in Singapore. The company is currently operating in stealth mode.

name: Kinkhao

name: Kita Bisa

name: Seamorny
description: The company is currently operating in Stealth mode.

The company's platform offers consumer credit score and traditional credit score checks based on social, web and mobile data, enabling lenders to detect identity fraud, verify application data and evaluate credit risk and confidently lend to financially invisible consumers who are not covered by credit bureaus.

name: TTRacing
description: Manufacturer of gaming chairs and accessories intended to provide long hours of comfort for greater productivity and performance. The company offers ergonomic gaming chairs as well as smart desks, cable organizers, cushions, casters, and many more, enabling gamers to play and enjoy games comfortably.

name: Umbala
description: Developer of a video messaging application. The company develops an application that enables users to watch events and news posted by other local users around the world.

name: Una Brands
description: Provider of strategic branding services intended to accelerate e-commerce growth. The company uses significant growth capital to transform e-commerce brands by buying category-winning brands with a strong track record, high product quality, and great customer reviews, enabling businesses to grow into global, well-loved, and enduring household names.

name: UrbanHire
description: Developer of an online recruitment platform designed to assist the employee searching and hiring process. The company's platform offers to search for jobs through its portal and permits uploading resumes and the type of work domain they are looking for, enabling staffing agencies and HR departments to streamline their hiring process and recruit suitable employees.

name: UrbanMetry
description: Operator of a data aggregation firm intended to specialize in property and real estate markets. The company's firm harvests clean and analyses large amounts of city data through artificial intelligence and proprietary algorithms to extract trends and patterns in the built environment, enabling clients to get an efficient and transparent property market, improving city planning, and shaping a sustainable urban environment.

name: VaultDragon
description: Developer of a suite of healthcare data software designed to digitally empower healthcare providers and patients. The company's software digitizes medical records and helps to generate customizable reports with a real-time syncing facility that complements financial reports and research, enabling clinics to streamline their workflow, in turn, providing efficient delivery of healthcare.

name: Vircle
description: Developer of a financial application designed to provide cashless transactions. The company's platform offers a cashless system to parents to approve instant allowances, create savings habits, and encourage responsibility through chores and tasks, enabling kids to learn and experience money safely.

name: Virtualtech Frontier
description: Developer and provider of virtual event solutions created to serve as a catalyst to promote collaboration and engagement by bridging digital technologies into real-world applications. The company offers virtual solutions for any type of event including virtual exhibitions, classrooms, and conferences, live-stream events, along with some added features such as allowing visitors to take photos and edit them for social media, online payment gateway integration, enabling users to sell and carry out transactions directly from their virtual events among others.

name: Volt14
description: Operator of an anode manufacturing company intended to develop ultra-high performance materials for Li-ion batteries. The company's products are built using a wet chemistry approach and mainly include lithium anodes which can be used in any Li-ion battery for 3C applications, automobiles and systems, or defense and space, enabling energy industry manufacturers to use their existing product line of applications with these alternative battery anodes, without any manufacturing bottlenecks.

name: Vonder
description: Developer of an online learning platform designed to provide microlearning via chatbots. The company's platform offers a cloud-based learning management system to deliver effective and engaging online training, enabling organizations to support corporate learning and talent development and schools to provide efficient learning to students.

name: WeGoWhere
description: Operator of a social networking application platform intended to encourage people to meet offline. The company's platform helps to discover fun activities happening around and see who's joining, enabling users to meet up, have fun and get notified about upcoming events and activities.

name: Wifkain
description: Developer of a manufacturing-as-a-service platform designed to connect fashion businesses with fabric suppliers. The company's platform specializes in making it convenient to receive fabrics from suppliers directly, both online and offline to oversee transparent production progress, enabling users to view and order fabrics and order samples effortlessly with direct touch and sensation at all times.

name: Workclass
description: Operator of an online job search platform intended to serve blue-collar workers. The company offers to help match employers with relevant workers as well as provides a portal for candidates to search and find jobs matching their skills, enabling individuals to search for jobs as well as provide companies access to resumes and hire matching candidates.

name: Worq
description: Provider of space-as-a-service designed for companies of all sizes from fast-growing startups to multinational corporations. The company uses its on-demand office network to offer community-based workspaces, including community events, high-speed internet, virtual office setups, and private telephone booths, enabling members to discover opportunities while sharing experiences and benefit from the one-stop business center services.

founders.name: Worq Space Investor Relation Not Needed

name: Xfers
description: Operator of a payment processing platform intended to offer credit card processing and internet banking transfers. The company's platform leverages technology to offer secured payment technology to automate bank transfer payments, enabling users to pay, receive and manage online payments.

name: Xwork
description: Operator of an online workspace search platform intended to find and rent a room according to users' needs. The company's platform allows users to book meeting rooms, event spaces, coworking spaces, office rooms, and virtual offices among others, enabling users to use and benefit from the spaces that meet their requirements.

name: YourPay
description: Developer of a mobile banking platform intended to empower and transform the financial lives of customers. The company's platform helps to provide savings accounts, productive loans, consumer loans, low-interest rates and prepaid cards with no fees, enabling users to easily manage their money through their mobile.

name: Caer
description: Manufacturer of baby food products intended to provide science-based early childhood meals and vitamins for brain development. The company offers fresh, nutrient-dense, low-sugar baby food tailored to the diets of different age groups, enabling parents to provide their children with sufficient nutrition, particularly during their first few years of life.

name: ZaynFi
description: Zayn Network is a cutting-edge modular Layer 2 ZK Sovereign Rollup uniting Bitcoin and Ethereum's strengths, offering trustless interoperability and optimized efficiency, scalability, and security, while targeting $2.8T RWA opportunities in MENAP and Southeast Asia, supported by prominent investors like 500 Global and Cur8 Capital.

name: Zeemi.tv
description: Provider of a live video streaming platform intended to provide digital concierge service. The company's live video streaming platform includes a community forum for sharing emotion and insights, enabling users to share their experiences and talents via live video from mobile and desktop platforms.

name: Ztock
description: Operator of an investment application intended to invest in the capital markets. The company's platform offers to trade stocks and ETFs in the United States and the Philippines and also provides security for the funds and build portfolios, enabling financial institutions' data encryption and empowering the next generation of investors.

name: Finsify
description: Cross platform solution that helps people simply manage personal finances by consolidating all accounts such as bank and cash in one place.

name: Billplz
description: Provider of an online payment gateway designed to initiate automate and cashless bill payment system. The company's online payment gateway provides a fully secure payment portal where users can share the confidential bank details, enabling users to be assured of safety and privacy.

name: ZipMatch
description: Provider of a real estate brokerage and listing platform designed to offer real estate trends information. The company's real estate brokerage and listing platform offers interactive visual content like 360-degreemore

name: TableApp
description: Provider of an online table booking application designed to make restaurant reservations quicker and easier. The company's online table booking application assists, reviews and manages reservations all-in-one, enablings users to locate, assess and reserve a table instantly with instant confirmation.

name: Wallex
description: International payments and cash management for businesses - simplified

name: Novocall
description: Developer of web callback service platform intended to convert web visitors into call leads. The company's platform captures and distributes qualified sales call leads for inside sales and sales teams, enabling website visitors to request an instant callback from the company faster.

name: Zumata
description: Developer of a Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) travel technology designed to solve complex problems. The company's technology uses artificial intelligence and machine learning capabilities to offer internet booking engines and travel content, enabling companies to overcome the many challenges of accommodation distribution, increase speed to market and maximize profit from each sale.

name: iGrow
description: Provider of an online agricultural management platform intended to help farmers to produce high quality organic food. The company's platform connects sponsors, farmers, land owners and crop buyers, enabling farmers to stay updated easily.

name: Upcode Academy
description: Provider of an application designed to make money through social content. The company's application helps to build and manage customized e-commerce website, enabling users to create branded shop to sell products to their followers.

name: BloomThis
description: Provider of an online subscription based flower delivery platform. The company delivers handcrafted designer flowers, straight from the farms, in a bespoke box on-demand and on a subscription basis, enabling users to regularly send beautiful flowers fresh from the farm.

name: Food Advisor
description: Provider of a location based food recommendation platform. The company offers an area based food recommendation and discovery platform helping users view food outlets around their area.

name: Pokkt
description: Provider of a mobile video advertising platform intended to serve the application developers and publishers. The company's platform offers to make free purchases through multiple alternative monetization tools such as watching videos, subscribing to services, installing applications and participation in surveys, enabling clients to get connected with the right audiences.

name: Seekster
description: Seekster is Bangkok's trusted marketplace for services ranging from Cleaning services, air-conditioning technician services, Big Cleaning, etc.

name: BerryKitchen
description: Provider of an online catering service designed to provide food to the consumers at any location. The company's online catering service takes online orders for lunch boxes and bento meals, enabling consumers to order food from a varied range of delicious and healthy food menu.

name: Japan
description: Provider of cloud telephony tools. The company offers cloud telephony and SMS API tools used to connect calls and messages through the cloud.

name: Carnot Innovations
description: Developer of data analytics software for HVAC applications. The company's software algorithms enable enterprises to predict and detect operational defects in HVAC systems.

name: FazWaz
description: Operator of a property search portal designed to find desirable properties in a hassle-free manner. The company's portal uses the latest technologies and up-to-date market data to capture leads, analyze trends and investment opportunities quickly scale across new markets, enabling customers to find properties of their choice in a hassle-free manner.

name: Fastwork
description: Provider of a mobile application for hiring freelancers. The company offers a freelance marketplace that helps companies in hiring freelancers for their requirements.

name: CYBAVO
description: Operator of a crypto custody firm intended to provide advanced digital asset custody by developing a custom operating system. The company provides blockchain security solutions via a patented encryption technology, and a highly secure sandboxed environment to deliver its suite of solutions, thereby helping clients easily manage digital assets and prevent malicious attacks, theft, and loss.

name: Kudo
description: Provider of an online platform designed to help businesses to create opportunities to grow their current business through technology. The company's online platform offers to make cash payments through a network of electronic machines to purchase e-commerce products without a credit card, as well as transportation tickets, enabling users to shop online with a safe payment gateway.

name: Hipflat
description: Provider of a real estate search platform designed to help people find the right home. The company's online real estate portal uses a smart automated system for collection, extraction and processing of real estate pricing data from hundreds of unstructured sources, which includes asking prices for over 2,500 projects going back as far as eight years, achievable rental yields and pricing trends, all at no cost to buyers, enabling property buyers and renters to do their research and make an informed decision about property purchases or sales.

name: Tappy
description: Developer of a social application. The company's application allows user to create a virtual community and location to discover people and relevant content.

name: Curlec
description: Developer of a digital financial platform intended to facilitate the collection of recurring payments. The company's platform conducts transactions and gathers cash receipts by intermediating between buyers, sellers, and their banks, enabling businesses to avail secure process of administering bank-to-bank payments.

name: Dropsuite
description: Provider of a cloud-based software platform designed to help businesses to backup, recover and protect their important business information. The company's cloud-based software platform offer services that include website and database backup, email backup and email archiving, enabling small and medium enterprises to restore and backup all their important data in a secured cloud storage.

name: Skootar
description: Developer of an online courier service booking platform designed to deliver goods and parcels in a convenient and reliable way. The company's online courier service booking platform matches the customer's request for document, parcel and food delivery with on-demand motorbike messenger and delivers the packages in a single trip, enabling customers to design their document workflow routes and get their things delivered quickly.

name: Poko
description: Developer of a digital supermarket application designed to support women in starting a business. The company engages in the asset-light retail network using digital tools and community leaders to bring quality, assortment, and pricing at par, enabling female micro-entrepreneurs to bring greater selection and affordable products to underserved communities.

name: Fave
description: Provider of a fitness and leisure platform designed to offer a range of consumer goods and services. The company's platform connects consumers to spa, health and fitness, food and other deal providers to make fitness and other services more accessible to its users so that they can obtain an all-access membership, enabling them to build their own fitness and spa schedule by choosing from many classes and activities in their cities.

name: Tradegecko
description: Provider of a cloud-based inventory management software-as-a-service (SaaS) platform intended to automate and reduce workflow inefficiencies. The company's platform integrates front-end e-commerce and POS software with back-end accounting and shipping software, enabling SMBs to manage their inventory efficiently, process orders quickly and change the pricing of their products dynamically.
